member.name: T:Dreamine.Hybrid.Wpf.Controls.HybridHostControl
member.summary: WPF에서 Blazor UI를 Embedded 형태로 호스팅하는 컨트롤입니다.
HybridHostControl

member.summary: Blazor HostPage 경로입니다.

member.summary: RootComponent가 마운트될 Selector입니다.

member.summary: Boolean을 Visibility로 변환하는 변환기

member.summary: 싱글톤 인스턴스

member.name: T:Dreamine.Hybrid.Wpf.DependencyInjection.ServiceCollectionExtensions
member.summary: Provides service registration extension methods for Dreamine Hybrid WPF.

member.name: M:Dreamine.Hybrid.Wpf.DependencyInjection.ServiceCollectionExtensions.AddDreamineHybridWpf(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection)
member.summary: Registers the default services required to run Dreamine Hybrid WPF.
member.returns: The same service collection instance for chaining.

member.name: T:Dreamine.Hybrid.Wpf.Hosting.DreamineBlazorServerHostedService`1
member.summary: Hosts a Blazor Server application inside the WPF process.

member.name: M:Dreamine.Hybrid.Wpf.Hosting.DreamineBlazorServerHostedService`1.#ctor(System.IServiceProvider,Dreamine.Hybrid.Interfaces.IHybridMessageBus,Dreamine.Hybrid.Wpf.Hosting.DreamineBlazorServerHostOptions)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:Dreamine.Hybrid.Wpf.Hosting.DreamineBlazorServerHostedService`1.RegisterSharedServices(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection)
member.summary: Registers services shared from the WPF host service provider.

member.name: M:Dreamine.Hybrid.Wpf.Hosting.DreamineBlazorServerHostedService`1.RegisterViewModels(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection,System.Reflection.Assembly)
member.summary: Registers public ViewModel classes from the specified assembly.

member.name: T:Dreamine.Hybrid.Wpf.Hosting.DreamineBlazorServerHostOptions
member.summary: Represents options for hosting a Blazor Server endpoint inside a WPF process.

member.name: P:Dreamine.Hybrid.Wpf.Hosting.DreamineBlazorServerHostOptions.Port
member.summary: Gets or sets the port used by the embedded Blazor Server host.

member.name: P:Dreamine.Hybrid.Wpf.Hosting.DreamineBlazorServerHostOptions.InstanceId
member.summary: Gets the unique ID for the current in-process server instance.

member.name: P:Dreamine.Hybrid.Wpf.Hosting.DreamineBlazorServerHostOptions.ListenAnyIp
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether Kestrel should listen on every network interface.

member.name: P:Dreamine.Hybrid.Wpf.Hosting.DreamineBlazorServerHostOptions.Host
member.summary: Gets or sets the local host name used when is false.

member.name: P:Dreamine.Hybrid.Wpf.Hosting.DreamineBlazorServerHostOptions.ContentRootPath
member.summary: Gets or sets the content root path used by the embedded Blazor Server host.

member.name: P:Dreamine.Hybrid.Wpf.Hosting.DreamineBlazorServerHostOptions.AutoRegisterViewModels
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether public ViewModel classes should be automatically registered.

member.name: P:Dreamine.Hybrid.Wpf.Hosting.DreamineBlazorServerHostOptions.SharedServiceTypes
member.summary: Gets service types that should be shared from the WPF host service provider to the Blazor Server host.

member.name: P:Dreamine.Hybrid.Wpf.Hosting.DreamineBlazorServerHostOptions.AllowDisposableSharedServices
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether disposable shared service instances may be registered in the Blazor Server container.
member.remarks: Keep this disabled unless the shared instance is safe for the Blazor Server host to dispose when it stops.

member.name: P:Dreamine.Hybrid.Wpf.Hosting.DreamineBlazorServerHostOptions.UseEmbeddedWebView
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the WPF shell should host an embedded WebView2 control.
member.remarks: Set this to false to keep the in-process server running while opening the admin URL in the user's default browser. This avoids machine-specific WebView2 rendering/input issues.

member.name: P:Dreamine.Hybrid.Wpf.Hosting.DreamineBlazorServerHostOptions.ConfigureServices
member.summary: Optional callback invoked before the Blazor Server host is built. Use this to register Scoped or Transient services into the Blazor Server DI container.

member.name: P:Dreamine.Hybrid.Wpf.Hosting.DreamineBlazorServerHostOptions.ConfigurePipeline
member.summary: Optional callback invoked after the default pipeline (UseStaticFiles, UseRouting, UseAntiforgery) is configured. Use this to add extra middleware, static file providers, etc.

member.name: P:Dreamine.Hybrid.Wpf.Hosting.DreamineBlazorServerHostOptions.ConfigurePipelineAfterRouting
member.summary: Optional callback invoked immediately after UseRouting and before UseAntiforgery. Use this to plug in endpoint-routing-dependent middleware such as UseAuthorization.

member.name: M:Dreamine.Hybrid.Wpf.Hosting.DreamineBlazorServerHostOptions.AddPhysicalStaticFiles(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Adds a physical directory as an additional static file provider at the given request path.

member.name: T:Dreamine.Hybrid.Wpf.Hosting.DreamineBlazorServerServiceCollectionExtensions
member.summary: Provides service registration extensions for Dreamine Blazor Server hosting.

member.name: M:Dreamine.Hybrid.Wpf.Hosting.DreamineBlazorServerServiceCollectionExtensions.AddDreamineBlazorServer``1(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection,System.Action{Dreamine.Hybrid.Wpf.Hosting.DreamineBlazorServerHostOptions})
member.summary: Registers a Blazor Server host that runs inside the WPF process.

member.name: T:Dreamine.Hybrid.Wpf.Hosting.DreamineWpfHostExtensions
member.summary: Provides extension methods for running WPF applications with a Generic Host.

member.name: M:Dreamine.Hybrid.Wpf.Hosting.DreamineWpfHostExtensions.RunDreamineWpfApp``1(Microsoft.Extensions.Hosting.IHost)
member.summary: Runs a WPF application using the specified Generic Host.

member.name: T:Dreamine.Hybrid.Wpf.Hosting.HybridWebViewHost
member.summary: Provides the public WebView2 host helpers supported by Dreamine Hybrid WPF.

member.name: M:Dreamine.Hybrid.Wpf.Hosting.HybridWebViewHost.CreateWebView
member.summary: Creates a WebView2 instance configured for Dreamine Hybrid hosting.

member.name: M:Dreamine.Hybrid.Wpf.Hosting.HybridWebViewHost.ShowOfflineMessageAsync(Microsoft.Web.WebView2.Wpf.WebView2,System.String)
member.summary: Displays an offline message in the specified WebView2 instance.
member.param: The URL that could not be reached.
member.returns: A task that represents the asynchronous operation.

member.name: T:Dreamine.Hybrid.Wpf.Interfaces.IDreamineServiceProviderAware
member.summary: Provides a contract for application classes that need access to the root service provider.

member.name: M:Dreamine.Hybrid.Wpf.Interfaces.IDreamineServiceProviderAware.SetServiceProvider(System.IServiceProvider)
member.summary: Sets the root service provider for the application.

members.member: \class WebView2Initializer WebView2 안전 초기화를 제공하는 정적 유틸 클래스
캐시 경로가 지정된 WebView2 인스턴스를 생성

member.name: T:Dreamine.Hybrid.Wpf.Utility.DesignTimeGuard
member.summary: Provides cached WPF design-time detection.

member.name: P:Dreamine.Hybrid.Wpf.Utility.DesignTimeGuard.IsInDesignMode
member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether the current process is running in the WPF designer.
